description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a variable REGISTRY_HUB set to registry.gitlab.com/sane-project/ci-envs and a single stage named archive. Add an archive job that runs in the archive stage using the Docker image $REGISTRY_HUB:debian-buster-full. In its before_script run "apt-get update --quiet" then "apt-get install --quiet --assume-yes libsane-dev libgtk-3-dev libgimp2.0-dev". In the script execute "extra=$(git describe --dirty --match \"1.*\" | sed \"s/^[^-]*//\"); sed -i \"/AC_INIT/s/AC_INIT([^,]*,\[[^]]*/&'$extra'/\" configure.ac", then "autoreconf -fvi", "./configure", and "make dist". Publish any files matching sane-frontends-*.tar.gz as artifacts. The pipeline has no additional services, caches, or conditional rules.
